title: Vec<&Form> collect() before every test eval
description: eval_header_test, eval_address_test, eval_envelope_test, eval_exists_test each open with `let refs: Vec<&Form> = forms.iter().collect()`, then pass &[&Form] to extract_match_type/extract_comparator/extract_address_part. The helpers could take &[Form] directly, eliminating a heap allocation on every test invocation — expected impact: one fewer Vec per test call.
